description_long: This object is a cylindrical sausage with a reddish-brown exterior, resembling a classic hot dog sausage. The surface is slightly textured with subtle ridges and a matte finish, giving it a realistic cooked appearance. There are no visible condiments, bun, or packaging, and the sausage is fully exposed from all angles. The coloration is consistent throughout, with a darker brown hue and some lighter highlights along the ridges. The ends are rounded, and the overall shape is straight and uniform, typical of a processed hot dog. The object appears solid and dense, with no visible openings or interactive components.
description: A reddish-brown, cylindrical sausage with a textured, matte surface and rounded ends, fully exposed with no bun or condiments.
description_view_0: The hot dog is viewed directly from one rounded end, showing a circular face and the uniform cylindrical shape.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the sausage, highlighting its textured surface and subtle ridges.
description_view_2: The opposite end view displays the other rounded tip, similar to view 0, with the cylindrical body receding away.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the length and surface details of the sausage.
